---
title: "Projects"
---

## Selected Projects

### Computational Analysis of Technoscientific Futures

This project analyzes future-oriented discourse using computational text methods.

🔗 [View full analysis](futures_analysis.html)

**Methods:** R, Python, text mining, embeddings\
**Status:** In progress

### Responsible AI Discourse Analysis

Computational analysis of how major technology firms frame responsibility, safety, and governance in AI policy documents.

**Methods:** R, Python, text mining, embeddings\
**Status:** In progress

### NLP and Media Integrity

Research on algorithmic bias, misinformation, and surveillance in Global South media contexts.

**Methods:** R, Python, qualitative + computational analysis
